headline: Buy Tapestry Stock to Profit From Gen Z’s Retro Tastes
summary: Tapestry’s Coach brand is popular with young consumers. A post-earnings selloff provides investors an entry point to get long the stock.

headline: Salesforce Sponsor Spotlight
summary: Madhav Thattai, Executive Vice President & General Manager, Agentforce at Salesforce speaks with Sameer Hassan, Chief Technology & Digital Officer at Williams-Sonoma about the latest in AI at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco.
